headline: Genetics and Heredity
description: Genetics studies heredity — how traits pass from parents to offspring. Mendel's laws (1866): segregation (alleles separate) and independent assortment. DNA structure (Watson/Crick, 1953). Human Genome Project (completed 2003) sequenced all ~3 billion base pairs. CRISPR-Cas9 (2012) enables precise gene editing.
